summary: First-run full testing of GrowItUp Employee Management System. Backend 21/21 tests pass. Frontend mostly working except Add Employee FAB button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay.

ui_bugs.issue: FAB button at bottom-right (fixed bottom-8 right-8) is blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay. Even force=True click fails to open the modal. User cannot add employees.

integration_issues.issue: Unable to test employee modal (3 tabs, state/city cascade, dept/position cascade) because FAB button is not clickable due to badge overlay

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge positioned at bottom-right overlaps the red 'Add Employee' FAB button
Status dot uses gray color (#6B7280) for both Active and Offline - no visual distinction between Active/Inactive employees

action_items: Fix FAB button position or z-index so 'Made with Emergent' badge doesn't intercept clicks. Options: move FAB to bottom-left, increase z-index above badge (badge appears to be at bottom-right), or adjust margin so FAB is above the badge.
Consider making employee status dot show green for Active and gray for Offline/Inactive (currently both show same gray)
critical_code_review_comments: FAB button (fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50) conflicts with 'Made with Emergent' badge position - badge intercepts pointer events per Playwright logs
Employee status indicator always shows gray regardless of status (should show green for Active)
server.py is 693 lines - acceptable but near threshold for splitting
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' which may be too permissive for production

test_credentials.note: Session inserted via mongosh, expires in 7 days from test run (Apr 4 2026)

seed_data_creation: Test session created via mongosh: user_id=test-admin-1775304935406, session_token=test_session_1775304935406
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session token test_session_1775304935406 may still be valid (7 day expiry). Backend all green. Main issue is FAB button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge. After fix, test: (1) Add Employee modal with 3 tabs, (2) State->City cascade, (3) Dept->Position->Level cascade, (4) Delete confirmation dialog. Job Positions and Departments pages are fully working.

rca_of_issue.issue: Add Employee FAB button not clickable
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The 'Made with Emergent' badge element (id=emergent-badge, bottom-right fixed) sits at the same position as the FAB button (fixed bottom-8 right-8). The badge has a higher z-index or covers the FAB area, intercepting all pointer events.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Navigate to /employees page, attempt to click 'Add Employee' button - badge intercepts click
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Move FAB to bottom-left OR add margin-right to push FAB above the badge OR reduce FAB's right position to avoid overlap
